'''Hilas Bannack''' was a member of the [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence's]] [[Bureau of Operations/Legends|Bureau of Operations]], which was responsible for finding/reporting seditious movements and traitorous elements within territories held by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Born on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] planet of [[Yarnil]] and known for spying on the various farmers and residents, Bannock's zeal caught the attention of [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]] and was immediately recruited.<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds" />
